ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k

Annotation Type IBcm.PowerOnOffNotice


  • @Retention(value=SOURCE)
public static @interface IBcm.PowerOnOffNotice

    • Field Detail

      • POWER_ON

        public static final int POWER_ON
        启动发电已激活

      • POWER_OFF

        public static final int POWER_OFF
        启动发电已关闭

      • CHARGING

        public static final int CHARGING
        无法启动发电，请取下充电枪

      • ENGINE_HOOD

        public static final int ENGINE_HOOD
        无法启动发电，请关闭机舱盖

      • LOW_OIL

        public static final int LOW_OIL
        启动发电退出，油量低

      • UN_GEAR

        public static final int UN_GEAR
        启动发电退出，请挂P档

      • LONG_TIME

        public static final int LONG_TIME
        启动发电退出，已达最大时间

      • NOTFIND_VALID_KEY

        public static final int NOTFIND_VALID_KEY
        启动发电退出，未找到有效钥匙

      • LOW_PRESSUR

        public static final int LOW_PRESSUR
        启动发电退出，低压系统故障

      • HIGH_PRESSURE

        public static final int HIGH_PRESSURE
        启动发电退出，高压系统故障

      • MAX_TIMES

        public static final int MAX_TIMES
        启动发电失败，已达最大次数
